name: AiSensum
description: Developer of Robotic Process Automation (RBS) tools intended to help in the collection of accurate data. The company's tools include monetizing retail, telco, pharma, and finance data assets from startups through a revenue share arrangement as well as artificial intelligence modules which are designed to sit within legacy systems and help improve system performance over time, enabling businesses to access a lower-cost alternative to automated AI platforms.

name: Balloon
description: Developer of an insight mobility platform intended to solve the systemic issues that hold back teams and drive them to true growth. The company's platform levels the playing field and removes costly cognitive biases like groupthink, gender bias, and anchoring from collaboration, decision-making, and innovation, enabling companies to identify priorities, reach decisions and define decisions that streamline workflows, allowing clients to lead to fewer meetings and productive results.

name: Bitacora.io
description: Developer of an online platform intended to create automatic reports for desk-less workers. The company's platform helps desk-less workers in construction and maintenance teams to speed up reporting by creating automated reports and allows managers to analyze and discover opportunities to improve internal processes, enabling workers to manage on-site information in a hassle-free manner.

name: Blink
description: Developer of online ordering and delivery software designed to take online orders directly from the websites. The company's software features customer engagement tools, ordering channels, reporting dashboards, and order trends, enabling businesses to access customer data with analytics to make informed decisions and break their dependency on food delivery aggregators.

name: Boomerang
description: Developer of an e-mail productivity software designed to encourage people to be productive. The company's software analyzes the selected e-mail messages and searches across the enterprise through shared network drives and Sharepoint sites and displays related documents, enabling companies to work efficiently and save time.

name: Cube.js
description: Developer of an analytical application platform designed to build internal business intelligence tools and add customer-facing analytics to existing applications. The company's platform effectively handles data volumes up to trillions of data points and provides built-in security and scales to thousands of customers, enabling clients to fetch data instead of pre-built visualizations.

name: Element Ai
description: Developer of AI software designed to offer deep domain expertise and access to cutting-edge technology. The company's software operationalize and create business impact with a suite of products, services and tools which redefine peak performance with problem-solving technology that continuously learns and improves, enabling clients to unlock insights, accelerate adoption and allow their employees to make decisions with explainable solutions.

name: FineDine
description: Developer of a digital menu platform designed to help restaurants, cafés, bars and hotels increase sales and lower operational costs. The company's platform offers an error-free ordering process, promotes items, tracks customer behavior and collects feedbacks, enabling restaurants to minimize customer waiting time and employee costs.

name: Tamadé
description: Developer of a biofeedback and virtual reality-based therapy platform designed to manage pain and anxiety. The company's platform features interactive experiences that teach users how to regulate their nervous system through training, keep track of their progress, and share it with a supportive community, enabling users to overcome pain and anxiety through virtual reality and relaxation.

name: Alwans
description: Developer of a cloud-based restaurant management system designed to offer a holistic overview of the company and its operations. The company's system offers a tool for managing sales, transactions, inventory, employee schedules, logistics, e-commerce, and customer relationships, enabling businesses to increase their revenues and build relationships with diners.

name: Geckoboard
description: Developer of a live television dashboard designed to assist everyone in a team in focusing on metrics that matter to a business. The company's dashboard platform is used to collect business information from many online services, and summarize it to distill the key messages and displays on the screen, enabling businesses to be honest and effective by using data to set clear goals.

name: GoatChat AI - Adaptive Plus Inc.
description: Developer of an e-commerce store maker app intended to help businesses launch an online store. The company's platform offers a variety of features, such as a drag-and-drop editor, customizable templates, and integrated payment processing, enabling small businesses to create and manage their own online stores easily.

name: Instaread
description: Developer of an online book summarization application designed to provide key insights into books in readable and audible formats. The company's application sums up and provides analysis, key takeaways, and insights from bestselling non-fiction books in text and audio format, enabling users to read or listen to and understand the concepts of their favourite books.

name: Beep
description: Developer of a sharing visual tasks software designed to provide visual feedback and instructions. The company offers instant screenshots and hashtags for bookmarking webpages, enabling clients to get boosted team collaboration speed.

name: Ulysses
description: Developer of workplace digitization software designed to keep a track of on-site work records. The company's software digitizes the work that was done on paper and excel, such as digitizing handwritten information, tabulating it and reporting, making the working styles of non-desk workers at all sites, such as manufacturing, retail, eating, drinking and logistics, smarter, enabling organizations to automate on-site routine work and clerical work.

name: Logiless
description: Developer of an inventory management platform designed to collectively manage orders and inventory. The company's platform automates the work of e-commerce business from ordering to shipping eliminating manual work from order receipt to shipment, realizing speedy shipment, enabling warehouse operators to improve their productivity.

name: Make the Dot
description: Figma for fashion design

name: MeetAndy AI
description: MeetAndy helps software teams work faster and smarter by automating best practices.

name: Mentimeter
description: Developer of an audience engagement platform designed to transform conventional presentations into interactive experiences. The company's platform is used to create add polls, word clouds, quizzes, slides, and more, and help meetings, conferences, events, and training sessions to make them more productive and effective, enabling businesses to engage audiences and inspiring leaders to talk less and listen more.

name: Motion
description: Developer of a creative analytics platform designed to increase the impact of creative performance through data-driven decision-making. The company's platform offers different tools that translate insights into visual reports to bridge the gap between media buyers and creatives and combines visual content with performance metrics, enabling growth and marketing teams of businesses to eliminate information overload and identify key drivers of creative performance to improve their creative strategy.

name: Otter
description: Developer of a team collaboration platform designed for meetings and conversations. The company's platform generates notes for meetings, interviews, lectures, and records conversations using a phone or web browser, imports or sync recordings, get real-time streaming transcripts within minutes, searchable notes with text, audio, images, speaker ID, and key phrases and also shares or export voice notes to inform others and get on the same page, enabling clients to search, play, edit, organize, and share conversations from any device.

name: Persona Studios
description: Developer of artificial intelligence assistants and personas designed to solve complex life challenges, enhance everyday routines, and just have fun. The company provides a suite of assistants that help with a variety of tasks, such as booking appointments, ordering groceries, making travel arrangements, and many more, enabling users to simplify their lives and get more done.

name: Plant an App
description: Developer of a low-code cloud-based platform designed to facilitate rapid development and deployment of web applications. The company's platform allows information technology teams to translate their work, ideas, and processes into software with advanced code and orchestrating apps created by business users, enabling small and medium-sized businesses to create, edit, and manage web apps online with little to no coding knowledge.

name: Qentaz
description: Qentaz is a SaaS+Payment platform that streamlines last-mile payment and reconciliation operations.

name: Sciket
description: Developer of an online shopping platform intended for the purchase and sale of scientific research commodities by researchers. The company's platform offers multiple payment options, cross-device compatibility, price transparency, commodity consulting service and artificial intelligence-backed recommendations for each user's needs, enabling research practitioners to find their desired products with accuracy, speed and convenience and have an innovative research shopping experience.

name: Splab
description: Developer of a scheduling automation tool designed to quickly and easily propose and coordinate team-level schedules. The company's tool offers an intuitive interface that allows users to check multiple schedules created by users in real time on one screen, enabling corporate sales and human resources teams to save a lot of time when setting up meetings with clients or interviews with candidates.

name: Squadle
description: Developer of a restaurant operations platform designed to digitize paper-based restaurant playbooks, checklists and compliance forms. The company's platform directs integration to hardware and sensors and gives a centralized view of store performance, enabling multi-unit operator restaurants to simplify complex operations and streamline food safety.

name: Stack
description: Developer of internet launchpad software designed to offer an unlimited split-screen view. The company's software increases the efficiency of working with the web for the average internet user by allowing simultaneous use of multiple web applications within a neatly organized working environment as well as unifying notifications, enabling clients to boost productivity and get protection from unwanted threats.

name: Stuck
description: Developer of an on-demand technology platform designed to provide quality and hassle-free writing. The company's platform helps to provide translation from Arabic to English, proofreading of the documents, rephrasing and revamping the contents, content development, and language branding to create the desired tone and message, enabling individuals and businesses to get language support.

name: Sudowrite
description: Developer of an AI tool designed for writers to generate endless possibilities based on their plots. The company's platform is an Open AI Foundation's GPT-3 and other natural language processing models that generate more vivid descriptions, bust through writer's block, and invent clever narrative twists, enabling fiction writers to unleash their creative potential using the writing AI collaborator tool.

name: Superhuman
description: Developer of an email extension application intended to offer electronic mailing services. The company's application offers features such as undoing sent messages, getting insights from social networks, following up on reminders and sending scheduled messages, enabling users to get quick and effective email services.

name: Swept
description: Developer of an operational cleaning management platform designed to oversee commercial cleaning businesses. The company's platform assists cleaning companies in communicating with employees and customers, completing inspections, and ordering supplies in real-time, enabling companies to increase profits and customer retention.

name: Tallyfy
description: Developer of a cloud-based workflow automation software designed to track and improve recurring workflows in real-time. The company's software specializes in client onboarding, customer success, business process management, workflow, process improvement, and compliance, enabling businesses to prevent human errors and streamline their processes.

name: TAXO
description: Developer of taxation software designed to create a tailored system for accountants. The company's software specializes in offering taxation, tracking, automation, and communication tools, and a client terminal as well as shares tax reports and invoices, and triggers email alerts, enabling accountants to communicate with their colleagues and clients and manage their work.

name: OK Play
description: Developer of personal artificial intelligence (AI) platform intended to offer a step-by-step roadmap to dream jobs. The company's platform automatically builds an optimized action plan for learning, by taking career goals, preferred learning styles, and current skills into account, enabling users to develop the skills they need for the next step in their careers.

name: TimeBlocks
description: Developer of a time management platform intended to manage daily and long-term plans. The company's platform offers a calendar library utilizing a structure-based drag-and-drop technology that eliminates the need for multiple page transitions to sync the current schedule and planned events in one place, enabling users to manage their schedules quicker than conventional calendar applications.

name: Memory
description: Developer of a tracking software designed to track and manage time and work automatically. The company's application features automatic time tracking, project time management, and team time management which records work, groups it, suggests time entries, and offers suggestions, enabling clients to track their work efficiently while increasing sales and productivity.

name: ToyTalk
description: Developer of a platform that provides agencies and enterprises with the ability to collaboratively design, prototype, and publish highly engaging voice applications for Amazon Alexa, Google Assistant, and IoT devices.

name: Unito
description: Developer of a project management platform designed to integrate disparate SaaS applications and to synchronize projects, tasks, and conversations between different applications. The company's platform helps to work seamlessly without switching applications all the time, choose what to sync between tools, and copy a few tasks or entire projects from multiple tools, enabling businesses to be productive and have enhanced team collaboration.

name: Userpilot
description: Developer of a product experience software designed to increase user adoption through behavior-driven product experiences. The company's software increases user adoption by assisting product teams to trigger the right in-application experience to the right persona at the right stage of their user journey, enabling businesses to increase activation and stimulate feature discovery among users as their product evolves.

name: Vela Labs
description: Developer of an online marketplace aggregation and management tool designed for e-commerce sellers to optimize, and grow their business. The company's tool harnesses organization design techniques into the dashboard by centrally integrating e-commerce channels and leveraging the network's collective data to inform and automate all key decisions, enabling merchants to manage their business across multiple sales channels through one platform and increase revenue while reducing the time and effort involved.

name: Viewabo
description: Viewabo delivers AI-powered Visual Support, enabling businesses to diagnose and resolve hardware issues faster with minimal human intervention.

name: Wedgies
description: Provider of a real-time polling platform designed to aggregate data and initiate interaction through survey questions. The company's platform operates an online tool that works everywhere like tablet, mobile and desktop, enabling users to create, conduct and share surveys. It offers a survey tool for publishers and media outlets.

name: Avocode
description: Developer of a file-sharing software designed to facilitate collaboration between designers and developers. The company's software exports images without preparing layers from Photoshop and Sketch designs, including colors, image assets, fonts, text, sizes, and dimensions, enabling customers to work on the web and mobile projects efficiently.

name: Don.na
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence software. The company is the creator of Donna, a mobile personal assistant that anticipates individual needs.

name: Sunrise Atelier
description: Provider of a free calender application for mobile devices. The company has developed a mobile application that is made for Google Calendar users, providing real-time synchronization, quick-add event tools, time-zone support and Facebook events and birthdays.

name: Regulus
description: Recruiting automation

name: TaskDock
description: Developer of a solution that helps integrate applications such as Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and the web with mobile devices.

name: Deal Connect
description: Developing a logistics optimization service for scrap metal industry

name: CE 140
description: Provider of database intended to help businesses discover, buy and use software. The company's database provides a platform for people to share information on productivity products and find what others are using, enabling companies to better discover software they should buy, with recommendations based on their current stack and what similar companies are using.

name: Atexto
description: Provider of transcription services intended to offer speech-to-text transcriptions. The company's platform offers audio transcription service to train, test and tune voice machines, creating folders for each file or project and accessing live visibility about transcript progression and downloading them when they are ready, enabling companies to access their platform to load recording files to transcribe at any time and at a low cost.

name: WorkLife
description: Provider of a Web application to conduct meetings. The company provides a virtual meeting platform that lets co-workers collaborate in real time on things like documents, notes, agendas, and tasks.

name: Prodsmart
description: Provider of a real-time tracking application designed to keep a track of the factory operations. The company's application offers a tracking system that eliminates paperwork, collect real-time data by using smartphones on the shop floor and keeps a track of the production flow, enabling factories to have a visibility over production and make decisions based on real-time data.

name: Peoplise
description: Provider of a cloud-based recruitment platform designed to help HR practitioners to utilize digital and analytical technologies. The company's platform to help in talent acquisition process and create the better teams for business with lower turn-over, higher performance, enabling users to target the candidates via employer-branded advertisements and video-enabled digital screening.

name: Gantto
description: Provider of project management tool which uses gantt chart for visual representation. The company's platform enables users to create their own charts and presentations to show project progress and management.

name: Y&S
description: Developer of a beauty booking mobile application designed to discover and book shifts in beauty centers. The company's beauty booking mobile application helps users to find beauty salons, spa centers and parlours and it offers a database of available services by those salons with prices, enabling users to browse, find and book parlour slots with required services as per their preferable time.

name: Friendly Data
description: Developer of a natural language interface designed to integrate human voice and text into queries to simplify sorting through data. The company's interface translates human language into SQL query and then returns data in JSON format, enabling businesses to increase user engagement and employees productivity by providing natural language interface for databases.

name: Otherinbox
description: Provider of domain name services to Web users. The company provides email account hosting services to consumers. Additionally, it offers newsletters, social networking updates, and online purchase receipts and coupons organizing services.
